{{Quote|For the next few standard months all our agents, regardless of whether or not they are reptilian, should be wary of Ssach'thirix: he is undoubtedly still very sore (both physically and otherwise) from his recent attempt on Lt. Commander Xenon Nnaksta.|[[Lieutenant Commander/Legends|Lieutenant Commander]] [[Adazian Liebke]], [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]|<ref name="AIR" />}}
'''Ssach'thirix''' was a [[Shatras]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] operating during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He usually carried a [[Light repeating blaster/Legends|light repeating blaster]], a [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]], and [[Grenade/Legends|grenades]] as weapons of choice, plus manacles and an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial Peace-Keeping Certificate/Legends|Peace Keeping Cerfiticate]].

==Biography==

Ssach'thirix was specialized in the hunting of [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] reptilians, for unknown reasons. Some theories suggested that he might believe in the superiority of the Shatras over other reptilian species.<ref name="AIR" />

Ssach'thirix claimed the bounties on many [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] operatives, including [[Larkor]], a [[Barabel/Legends|Barabel]], and [[Thlan-sa]], a [[Kath/Legends|Kath]]. [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence]] wanted Ssach'thirix because of this.<ref name="AIR" />

A successful hunter, he had only failed a limited amount of times, including an attempt on the life of special operative [[Jungen]] and a well-documented attack on Rebel [[Lieutenant Commander/Legends|lieutenant commander]] [[Xenon Nnaksta]]: Nnaksta and fellow Rebel [[Adazian Liebke]] were gathering supplies for a Rebel cell on [[Pii III]] and were tracked by Ssach'thirix. Ssach'thirix chased Liebke and Nnaksta who, believing Ssach'thirix was an Imperial bounty hunter, asked for reinforcement in the form of [[Kichiir]] and other associates. Ssach'thirix was eventually bruised and beaten, but he survived.<ref name="AIR" />

Ssach'thirix and bounty hunter [[Kal-tan-shi]] had been rivals with for years, with each of them trying to disturb the hunting of the other.<ref name="AIR" />
